prompt: Create a warm, dreamy product photography scene for an original clear smartphone case and matching phone wallpaper. Show two phones standing upright on a rustic wooden table: the left phone is angled forward showing the back case, and the right phone is slightly behind it showing the front lock screen. The case design is a delicate fairy-tale illustration featuring a gentle long-haired girl in a flowing cream dress with hands clasped standing on a soft green meadow, surrounded by white rabbits, tiny flowers, gold stars, vines, and soft beige sparkles. Count exactly 11 rabbits on the phone case illustration: 3 small rabbits at the lower left of the girl, 3 small rabbits at the lower right of the girl, 3 larger rabbits along the bottom foreground, and 2 upright rabbits near the lower center-right. Add exactly 1 small white ghost charm illustration near the top center of the case and exactly 1 tiny bunny charm illustration beside the camera area. The phone case is transparent glossy plastic with raised gold edging around a triple-lens camera module, subtle embedded glitter, rounded corners, and visible side buttons. Attach a dangling gold chain strap to the upper left side of the case with exactly 7 charm elements: 1 sage-green satin bow, 1 white bunny charm, 1 pink flower charm, 1 green faceted teardrop crystal, 1 gold flower charm, 1 pearl cluster charm, and 1 small dangling pearl-and-flower charm at the bottom. At the bottom of the case illustration, include a tiny cream plaque with the quote Gentle heart / Kind soul / Bright days. The matching front phone wallpaper on the right should repeat the same girl, meadow, rabbits, floral vines, and sparkles, with a floral arch near the top; display large lock-screen time 10:30 and date Tuesday, May 20, plus typical small phone status icons. Use a soft cream, sage green, pale pink, and antique gold palette. Background: sunlit bokeh garden atmosphere with warm golden light, lace fabric on the table, a small illustrated paper card at the lower right, and scattered pearls and floral decorations. Style: high-end kawaii handmade accessory product photo, shallow depth of field, realistic glossy materials, fine illustrated linework, soft highlights, cozy morning glow, no harsh shadows, no watermark, no extra text beyond the lock screen and quote.
